/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cauldron_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cauldron_tests.dir/tests/CombatTests.cpp.o -o cauldron_tests  libcauldron_core.a _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so
